# JetBrains Mono NL Nerd Font Mono

Archphene vendors the no-ligature, fixed-width regular face from Nerd Fonts
`v3.4.0`. The `Mono` variant keeps patched symbol glyphs within one terminal
cell. The file is loaded explicitly by Archphene Terminal rather than through
Android's device-dependent `monospace` family alias.

Upstream: https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts
Source: `patched-fonts/JetBrainsMono/NoLigatures/Regular/JetBrainsMonoNLNerdFontMono-Regular.ttf`
License: SIL Open Font License 1.1, included as `OFL.txt`

The pinned SHA-256 values are recorded in `SHA256SUMS` and verified before the
Terminal APK is built.
